title: eulophia leucantha
intro: Eulophia leucantha, also known as the white-crested eulophia, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to heal wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Eulophia leucantha include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots and leaves are used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves.
